---
title: "The Spatial Prisoner's Dilemma"
short-title: "Spatial PD"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Nowak and May's spatial model, lattice dynamics, and animated visualizations."
keywords: ["spatial games", "Prisoner's Dilemma", "lattice", "Nowak", "gganimate"]
---

# Spatial Prisoner's Dilemma {#sec-spatial-pd}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
